text:
Medicare-Medicaid Linked Enrollee Analytic Data Source (MMLEADS) V2.0
Beneficiary/Enrollee File Data Dictionary - Includes all Medicare eligible (Medicare-only, Medicare-Medicaid eligible) and Medicaid-only with disability enrollees
Note: Individual Identifier is BENE_ID and when BENE_ID is missing MSIS_ID/STATE_CD is unique person identifier
Category Variable Name Description Values
Identifiers REFERENCE_YEAR Beneficiary enrollment reference year 2006 - 2012
 SAMPLE_IND 1% random sample
